snippet.title: Polo G - RAPSTAR (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official video for "RAPSTAR" by Polo G

Listen + Download "RAPSTAR" out now: https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR

Amazon Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/amazonmusic
Apple Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/applemusic
Audiomack - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/audiomack
Deezer - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/deezer
iTunes - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/itunes
Soundcloud - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/soundcloud
Spotify - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/spotify
YouTube Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/youtubemusic

Lyrics

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

I won’t love a hoe after we fuck she can’t get near me
Only bitch I give a conversation to is Siri
My pants Amiri
Yes I’m winning clearly
I’m the chosen one see my potential so they fear me
Lately I’ve been praying God I wonder can you hear me
Thinking about the old me I swear I miss you dearly
Stay down until you come up I’ve been sticking to that theory
Every day a battle I’m exhausted and I’m weary
Make sure I smile in public when alone my eyes teary
I fought through it all but that shit hurt me severely 
I’ve been getting high to hide behind my insecurities
Taking different pills but I know it ain’t no 

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

They say I’m Pac rebirth
Never put out a weak verse
Homicides when we lurk
Imma step ‘til my feet hurt
Been putting them streets first
White tee turned burgundy tee shirts
Looking for something real, he stuck in a deep search
Anxiety killing me I just wanna leave Earth
When they ask if I’m okay it just make everything seem worse
Trying to explain your feelings sound like something you rehearse 
Stab me in my back with a clean smirk

Looking so deep into your eyes I can read your thoughts
Shut the fuck- I mean please don’t talk
I’ve done been through too much and I don’t need another loss
Put that on every war scar for every battle that I’ve fought

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished
When I’m finished, when I’m finished

Directed by Arrad
Written & Co-directed by Polo G
Produced by Riveting Entertainment

#PoloG #RAPSTAR

snippet.title: AVSLÖJAR & KONFRONTERAR DENICE MELINN (MED ELVIS & ANJO)
snippet.description:
I denhär videon försöker jag ringa upp & prata med Paradise Hotel 2021 deltagaren Denice Melinn som haft ett fake-förhållande med Elvis på Instagram. Hon vill inte prata med mig men vi lyckas spela in hennes samtal med Elvis som är riktigt oroväckande. Anjo är också med och filmar och ger Elvis råd. Efter denna video borde det vara uppenbart för alla att hon utnyttjar Elvis. Både jag & Elvis har upprepade gånger förklarat för henne att Elvis har känslor för henne och att han inte är vuxen och mogen nog att förstå vad som händer. Hon har inte lyssnat utan har fortsatt att manipulera Elvis till att ge henne fler shout-outs på Instagram. Fast hon vet att 16 åriga Elvis är olyckligt kär i henne vill hon inte avsluta fake-förhållandet. Jag anser att hon som den vuxna i situationen borde tagit sitt ansvar såfort hon fick reda på att han hade känslor & avslutat förhållandet. Jag visar upp print screens ifrån min konversation med Denice som bevisar att hon inte bryr sig om hans känslor alls. Detta är definitionen av en clout chaser. 

FÖLJ MIG PÅ INSTAGRAM - @reallokal
FÖLJ ELVIS PÅ INSTAGRAM -  @Rs1 Elvis  
FÖLJ ANJO PÅ INSTAGRAM - @pontusbjorlund & prenumerera på han youtube kanal -  @ANJO

snippet.title: När orten möter landsbygden | Bosse & Kusinen
snippet.description:
Bosse har precis blivit släppt från häktet och känner sig modig nog att äntligen konfrontera "kusinen" efter senaste mötet då han blev rånad på sin mobiltelefon. Men Bosse märker snabbt att han inte lyckas skrämma grabbarna i orten och är tvungen att ta lite hjälp...

Glöm inte prenumerera och slå på ringklockan för mer videos. 👍🏼

snippet.title: Janne Raninen,#51, ”Solvalla, Gangsterkrig, Arlanda rånet, Kartellen och livstidsstraff.”
snippet.description:
Dragan "Jokso" Joksović, född 11 augusti 1956 i Pljevlja, Jugoslavien, död 4 februari 1998 i Stockholm, var en svensk-jugoslavisk krogägare. Polisen ansåg att Joksović kunde kallas Stockholms "gangsterkung". Man kunde dock inte beslå honom med andra brott än ringa narkotikabrott, misshandel och övergrepp i rättssak.
 Janne Raninen hade inte ens fyllt 21 år när han åtog sig att mörda Dragan Joksovic i februari 1998, som då ansågs som en av den undre världens då  mäktigaste män. Mordet blev upptakten till ett gangsterkrig inom restaurangbranschen. På kvällen 9 juli 1998 mördade fyra män en före detta torped på puben Broder Tuck i Stockholm. Den 26 oktober 2006 dömdes Raninen till livstids fängelse av Helsingfors hovrätt för ett annat mord ,på sin barndomsvän,knutet till ett rån vid Arlanda i juli 2002.
Under tiden i fängelse var han med och bildade rapgruppen Kartellen.  Hans brottsliga liv fortsatte och i dag är han nyligen frigiven för mordet på sin före detta barndomsvän.


Gillar du det vi gör och vill stötta med en engångssumma så swishar du på: 123 64 508 86

Följ oss på INSTAGRAM!

https://www.instagram.com/dialogiskt/
https://www.instagram.com/the1victorious/

Gäst: 
https://instagram.com/janneraninen?igshid=kf8ubc72z6z6

snippet.title: Predator Fight 2021 - Episode 3
snippet.description:
This week we visit big lake to compete for mysterious underwater wolves - huge zander. Some of the teams will use more traditional methods and some will sharpshoot in the open water using electronics. Which tactic will be more viable today?

All gear used in Predator Fight can be bought at http://www.sportfishtackle.com​

pl.title: Predator Fight 2021 - Odcinek 3
pl.description:
W tym tygodniu odwiedzamy duże jezioro, na którym zapolujemy na tajemnicze podwodne wilki - wielkie sandacze. Część drużyn będzie używać tradycyjnych metod, a niektóre spróbują namierzyć ryby za pomocą elektroniki. Która taktyka okaże się bardziej skuteczna?

Cały sprzęt użyty w Predator Fight można kupić na:
http://www.sportfishtackle.com​

fr.title: Predator Fight 2021 - Episode 3
fr.description:
Cette semaine, les compétiteurs s'affrontent sur un grand lac, à la recherche de mystérieux vampires – d'énormes sandres. Certaines équipes utiliseront des méthodes traditionnelles, tandis que d'autres utiliseront l'électronique pour faire du sharpshooting en pleine eau. Quelle tactique sera la meilleure ?...

Tout l'équipement utilisé dans Predator Fight peut être acheté sur http://www.sportfishtackle.com

de.title: Predator Fight 2021 - Episode 3
de.description:
Diese Woche besuchen wir einen grossen See um den mysterioesen Unterwasser-Woelfen - Riesen-Zandern nachzustellen.
Einige Teams werden eher traditionell fischen, waehrend andere pelagisches "Sharpshooting" in Verbindung mit neuester Sonar-Technik einsetzen werden. Welche Taktik wird sich auszahlen?...

Saemtliches Angelgeraet was Ihr beim Predator Fight sehen koennt, gibt es bei: www.sportfishtackle.com

snippet.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell05211

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesclimatenuclear/

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years – but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

localized.description:

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years – but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

snippet.title: DLGSKT Special, Alexander Bard, ”BLM är kontroversiellt!”
snippet.description:
Alexander Bard, är bland annat artist, musikproducent, författare och samhällsdebattör. 
Han är dock på senare tid mest uppmärksammad för sina ideologiska tankar och för sina kontroversiella utlägg och tweets på offentliga forum och sociala medier,som skapat kraftiga reaktioner och som även lett till att Bard bla fick gå från sitt uppdrag i @tv4talang .
I detta avsnitt försöker vi förstå vem Bard är ,vad hans provokativa förhållningssätt står för och hur hans uppväxt format honom. Och dessutom: är han rasist?

Gillar du det vi gör och vill stötta med en engångssumma så swishar du på: 123 64 508 86

Följ oss på INSTAGRAM!

https://www.instagram.com/dialogiskt/
https://www.instagram.com/the1victorious/

Gäst: 
ALEXANDER BARD 

Visuals:
Edit:
https://www.instagram.com//
- Inspelning: 
https://www.instagram.com/halilkoeker/
- Studio: 
https://www.instagram.com/ecthelabel/
https://www.instagram.com/trippelaaamusic/

https://www.instagram.com/picassoonthebeat/

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack Snyder’s Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero who’s now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), it’s with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thing’s for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweighöfer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Raúl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

snippet.title: مسلسل على صفيح ساخن ـ الحلقة 1 الأولى كاملة ـ Ala Safeeh Sakhn
snippet.description:
أفراد عائلة #على_صفيح_ساخن يشبهون كل فرد منا، أنت وأنا... في مواجهة كل ذلك القهر الذي يجري على أرضنا التي تخفي في باطنها عكس ظاهرها كأبنائها، وقبل كل شيء، يواجهون انفسهم بملائكتها وشياطينها بإثارة وتشويق في عوالم جديدة خطرة وعميقة وصادمة... وواقعية من لحم ودم

#باسم_ياخور #امل_بوشوشة #سلوم_حداد #عبدالمنعم_عمايري #ميلاد_يوسف #يامن_الحجلي #سمر_سامي #نظلي_الرواس #معن_عبدالحق #يزن_خليل #علياء_سعيد #سليم_صبري #عبدالفتاح_مزين #وائل_زيدان #شادي_الصفدي #عبدالرحمن_قويدر #محمد_قنوع #بلال_مارتيني #جورج_قبيلي #سارة_الطويل #تسنيم_باشا #سليمان_رزق #جنى_عبود

تأليف #علي وجيه ويامن الحجلي 

إخراج #سيف_سبيعي

إنتاج #غولدن_لاين #GoldenLine و #اي_سي_ميديا #Iseemedia و #LastCut يتناول المسلسل في إطار درامي اجتماعي التحديات التي يقف أمامها الجميع، عندما يتلقوا صدمات من أقرب الناس إليهم.

snippet.title: Sommarskuggan nr 6: Skuggornas dal (Trailer!)
snippet.description:
Sommarskuggan 6: Skuggornas Dal har PREMIÄR 10 APRIL 2021
Se mer Sommarskuggan på https://www.svt.se/Barn!
SVT Barns favoritskuggor är tillbaka och den här gången får man lära känna en till! I Skuggornas dal vilar en förbannelse - Kapten Doris och Vinterskuggan reser dit för att bryta den. Även Alex Hermansson och spöket Laslo råkar följa med på resan. Samtidigt i tv-huset blir Sommarskuggans dräkt stulen och den store superbusaren kommer återigen att ställa till det. Förste skuggjägare Angelika Prick ska försöka stoppa den och ta reda på vem som gömmer sig i dräkten.

snippet.title: Nassif Zeytoun - Aw'at [Till Death Series] (2021) / [مسلسل للموت] ناصيف زيتون - أوقات
snippet.description:
Nassif Zeytoun - Aw'at [Till Death Series] (2021) / [مسلسل للموت] ناصيف زيتون - أوقات


Lyricist: Mazen Daher
Composer: Ahmad Barakat
Arranger: Omar Sabbagh
Digital Distribution: @WATARY 

Lyrics | كلمات

"أنا من وجع الماضي جيت 
أنا من نقص الحب قسيت
أنا لو ما قلبي قويتو
ما كنت بهالدنيي بقيت
لو بجرح أوعى تعاتبني
كان لازم أوقع تا قوم
لو بدك ظالم تحسبني
أحسن ما إبقى مظلوم

أوقات القلب اللي بيوقف
بدو صدمة تا تمشيه
وأوقات القلب اللي بيضعف
بدو خيانة  تا تقويه 

لما تكون بإيدك لامس 
إنو الدنيي عدلا ناقص
حط حالك محلي وقلي 
ساعتها إنت شو حاسس 
بالحاضر رح تاخد تارك 
لما الماضي قسوة يزيدك
وتا تبرد جواتك نارك 
 رح تاخد حقك بِ إيدك

أوقات القلب اللي بيوقف
بدو صدمة تا تمشيه
وأوقات القلب اللي بيضعف
بدو خيانة  تا تقويه"


Subscribe to Nassif Zeytoun channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances.
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCO4AjeljgqgiowEf2yfvYHg

Visit Nassif Zeytoun official Website:
http://www.nassifzeytoun.com/

Follow Nassif Zeytoun on:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Nassif.Zeytoun
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nassifzeytoun
Twitter: https://twitter.com/NassifZeytoun
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@nassifzeytoun

Listen to Nassif Zeytoun on all the digital platforms:
https://lnkfi.re/NassifZeytoun

info@musicismylife.com
+961 1 4888868

إنو الدنيي عدلا ناقص
حط حالك محلي وقلي 
ساعتها إنت شو حاسس 
بالحاضر رح تاخد تارك 
لما الماضي قسوة يزيدك
وتا تبرد جواتك نارك 
 رح تاخد حقك بِ إيدك

أوقات القلب اللي بيوقف
بدو صدمة تا تمشيه
وأوقات القلب اللي بيضعف
بدو خيانة  تا تقويه"

snippet.title: PANNKAKSFEST MED KLAS ERIKSSON
snippet.description:
Filip Poon har bjudit in Klas Eriksson för att göra tre matiga pannkakor. 
Samtidigt utmanas Klas på vilka kunskaper han besitter i köket. 
Tack Klas för att du ville gästa kanalen! 

Vill du se mer av Klas Eriksson hittar ni hans kanal här:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClECehjqrft9ocH2dG3lHjA

Om ni vill se mer av Filip så hittar ni hans kanal här: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCcN54GrpL2nkkecIvsIsM7A

Recept på Okonomiyaki - japansk vitkålspannkaka hittar ni här: 
https://bit.ly/2OtMR5J

Recept på svensk pannkaka hittar ni här:
https://bit.ly/3sXdMpz

Recept på Indisk Pannkaka:
https://bit.ly/3wuhfhv

Om ni letar andra inspirerande recept från Arla kan ni hitta dem här: http://bit.ly/2Pcev4l

Matkanalen av Arla är en kanal där vi umgås med gäster och lagar god mat på ett enkelt sätt.
För att ta del av Arlas receptbank, gå in på följande länk: http://bit.ly/2Pcev4l

snippet.title: مسلسل على صفيح ساخن ـ الحلقة 2 الثانية كاملة ـ Ala Safeeh Sakhn
snippet.description:
أفراد عائلة #على_صفيح_ساخن يشبهون كل فرد منا، أنت وأنا... في مواجهة كل ذلك القهر الذي يجري على أرضنا التي تخفي في باطنها عكس ظاهرها كأبنائها، وقبل كل شيء، يواجهون انفسهم بملائكتها وشياطينها بإثارة وتشويق في عوالم جديدة خطرة وعميقة وصادمة... وواقعية من لحم ودم

#باسم_ياخور #امل_بوشوشة #سلوم_حداد #عبدالمنعم_عمايري #ميلاد_يوسف #يامن_الحجلي #سمر_سامي #نظلي_الرواس #معن_عبدالحق #يزن_خليل #علياء_سعيد #سليم_صبري #عبدالفتاح_مزين #وائل_زيدان #شادي_الصفدي #عبدالرحمن_قويدر #محمد_قنوع #بلال_مارتيني #جورج_قبيلي #سارة_الطويل #تسنيم_باشا #سليمان_رزق #جنى_عبود

تأليف #علي وجيه ويامن الحجلي 

إخراج #سيف_سبيعي

إنتاج #غولدن_لاين #GoldenLine و #اي_سي_ميديا #Iseemedia و #LastCut يتناول المسلسل في إطار درامي اجتماعي التحديات التي يقف أمامها الجميع، عندما يتلقوا صدمات من أقرب الناس إليهم.

ﺇﺧﺮاﺝ: سيف الدين السبيعي
ﺗﺄﻟﻴﻒ: يامن حجلي , علي وجيه 
طاقم العمل: باسم ياخور  , سلوم حداد , سمر سامي , عبدالمنعم عمايري ,أمل بوشوشة ,ميلاد يوسف

snippet.title: DEBATT: ALEXANDER BARD VS. JAN EMANUEL (YASIN BYN, BLM, VETLANDA)
snippet.description:
Jag sätter mig ner med ALEXANDER BARD & JAN EMANUEL i ett långt samtal där dom möter varandra för första gången i en debatt. Vi pratar om YASIN BYN som står åtalad för stämpling till människorov på en annan artist. Yasin vann två priser i årets P3 Guld, borde han ens fått nomineras och vart går gränserna för censur? Vi pratar även om Alexander Bards favoritämne BLACK LIVES MATTER och vi får för första gången höra vad Jan Emanuel tycker om Bards kontroversiella tweet. Vi pratar om terrorattentatet i Vetlanda och vem som bär ansvaret för den händelsen. Vi diskuterar filosofi, ideologi, socialdemokrati och om den har glidit ifrån sitt ursprung? Jag frågar Jan om han hade kunnat tänka sig att bli statsminister och mycket mer. Samtalet brusar upp lite när Alexander Bard uttrycker sig osmart om afhaner enligt Jan Emanuel. Allt detta & mycket mer i dagens video. 
Följ mig på Instagram - @reallokal
Följ Jan Emanuel på Instagram - @janemanuels
Följ Alexander Bard på Twitter - @Bardissimo
Videon är filmad utav - DAVID MIKIC - @davidmikic
OM DU LÄSER DETHÄR GLÖM INTE ATT PRENUMERERA!
tags: Alexander Bard VS. Jan Emanuel - DEBATT (YASIN BYN
JAN EMANUEL: DÄRFÖR KÖPER JAG KLOCKOR FÖR MILJONER

snippet.title: What Color Is My Hoodie?
snippet.description:
Grey? Blue? Purple? It can look different, depending on the context. Let's talk about color perception, color temperature, and the history of laundry.

Atmospheric opacity image from ESA/Hubble (F. Granato): https://www.eso.org/public/images/atm_opacity/ - image licensed under CC by 4.0 - https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

The optical illusion is original, but based on the work of David Novick: https://twitter.com/novickprof/status/1139342022551191553

More on Illuminant D65: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illuminant_D65 - the references in this article go into the full technical detail

I'm at https://tomscott.com
on Twitter at https://twitter.com/tomscott
on Facebook at https://facebook.com/tomscott
and on Instagram as tomscottgo

snippet.title: Debunking viral TIK TOK videos | How To Cook That Ann Reardon
snippet.description:

Support: https://patreon.com/h2ct

Hi I am Ann Reardon, How to Cook That is my youtube channel it is  filled with crazy sweet creations made just for you.   This week we are debunking viral Tik Tok and facebook videos that have been sent in to me.  Fake food videos seem to be on the rise because they re being rewarded by the platforms with views.  In this episode lets look at does Pepsi make worm parasites come out of pork?  Can you dice strawberry with razor blades?  Can you make pear jelly using lemonade?  Does storing strawberries in a jar make them last longer?  Can you cook steak in a toaster?   Join me for food science, creative cakes, chocolate & desserts, new video every second Friday.

========= The Royal Guard LYRICS =========

From the frozen north they came
Fought for founding father’s claim
It was then, their tale, began

Trace their roots from 16 strong
By the king where they belong

En tid
Av Krig

Wherever he goes, near or far, they are close
For the King of Sweden they lay down their lives

For the Swedish crown they stand
By the king, at his command
500 years for the fatherland
Marching across the belt
Crushing blow at Narva dealt
Livgardet our Royal Guard

Sworn protectors of the throne
Royal doctrine set in stone
For the crown, you shall give your life

By traditions from the past
Swedish soldiers stand steadfast

I frid
Och i strid

And if one should fall, yet another, heeds the call
For king and for country they lay down their lives

För Sverige i tiden
Dit konungen går
De gör vad som synes omöjligt, vad än framtiden spår

Still for the crown they stand
By the king, at his command
500 years for the fatherland
Marching across the belt
Crushing blow at Narva dealt
Livgardet our Royal Guard

==================================
Recorded and mixed at Black Lounge studios by Jonas Kjellgren. 
Mastered by Maor Appelbaum at Maor Appelbaum Mastering  - Los Angels -CA  -USA www.maorappelbaum.com.

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. It’s both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. It’s a vicious cycle.

ـــــ

localized.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
localized.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. It’s both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. It’s a vicious cycle.

snippet.title: Friterad Kyckling Burgare | Filip Poon
snippet.description:
Tjenixen På er! 
HÄR HITTAR NI ALL MIN KÖKSUTRUSTNING: 🌟
https://filippoon.tipser.com/

Här Finns Jag  på TikTok: 
https://www.tiktok.com/@filippoon

Och här på Instagram: @filippoon
https://www.instagram.com/filippoon/

För jobbkontakt: 

Filipp8n@gmail.com
______________________________

Recept:

Krispig Kyckling burgare:

2 burgare



Burgare
ca 300 g urbenad kycklinglårfilé ( 2st )
1 dl filmjölk eller gräddfil
1 st vitlöksklyfta 
1 dl mjöl
1 tsk vitlökspulver
1 tsk lökpulver
1 silverlök, i ca 1 cm tjocka skivor
2 brioche-hamburgerbröd
2 salladsblad
2 stora skivor bifftomat
2 saltgurkor, skivor
salt och peppar
Rapsolja till fritering 

Dressing
1 dl majonnäs
1 tsk sesamolja
1 msk Kimchee base eller chilisås. Tex sirasha


1. Blanda alla ingredienser till dressingen i en skål och ställ åt sidan så länge.

2. Riv ner en vitlöksklyfta i filmjölken, ha i kycklinglårfiléerna. Låt marinera minst 10 minuter, gärna över natten.

3. Värm upp Rapsolja i en kastrull till ca 170°c 
Blanda mjöl med salt, lökpulver och vitlökspulver i en skål. Doppa sen den marinerade kycklingen i mjölet, täck ordentligt och fritera sedan den i ca 3-4 minuter eller tills gyllene.

4. Rosta brödet.

5. Bred ut dressing på bröden, lägg ett salladsblad på varje, följt av en tomatskiva och saltgurka. Lägg sedan på den friterade kycklingen och silverlök, toppa med mer dressing och lägg slutligen på brödet. Njut! 



______________________________

snippet.title: If Your Cat Bites You, Here's What It Really Means
snippet.description:
PRIVATE DIARY ► https://goo.su/1S4k

Humans have not yet learned to understand the language of animals and that is why their behavior generate many questions: why do dogs tilt their heads all the time and why do cats make such strange noises? 
We'll try to answer all your questions and maybe we can help you understand your pets a little bit better.

00:00 - Welcome!
00:24 - Why do cats bite? (Preview)
01:01 - Why do dogs bark when seeing hugs?
01:45 - Why do cats freeze with their mouth open?
02:16 - Why do cats knock things over?
02:44 - Why do parrots grind their beaks?
03:30 - Why do cats bring us gifts?
04:04 - Why do dogs walk in circles?
04:36 - Why do cats drag their food out of their bowl?
05:12 - Why do rabbits thump their hind legs?
05:51 - Why do rabbits hop around?
06:16 - Why do hamsters freeze?
06:51 - Can guinea pigs purr?
07:15 - Why do dogs tilt their heads?
08:02 - Why do parrots need mirrors?
08:31 - Why do cats make strange noises?
tags: Why do dogs bark when seeing hugs

Why do parrots grind their beaks
Why do cats bring us gifts
Why do dogs walk in circles

snippet.title: - Är du "Mujaheed"? Hör utpekade gängledarens egna ord i rätten
snippet.description:
DET HÄR ÄR ÅTALET
• Misstankarna mot Yasin Mahamoud och kidnappningen av den kända artisten är en av en lång rad brottsmisstankar i ett mycket omfattande åtal där bevisningen till stor del utgörs av Encrochat-utdrag. Det är totalt 16 åtalspunkter, och 30 personer står åtalade.
De misstänkta brotten är bland annat försök till mord, synnerligen grovt narkotikabrott, synnerligen grovt vapenbrott, allmänfarlig ödeläggelse, grovt brott, rån och människorov.
• 28 av de 30 åtalade är häktade. 
• De mest uppmärksammade åtalspunkterna är åtalspunkt 1-5, samt åtalspunkt 9-10.
• Åtalspunkt 1-5 gäller försök till mord, synnerligen grovt vapenbrott och stämpling till mord. Det rör sig om en infekterad konflikt mellan två pojkar från samma kvarter som i vuxen ålder utmärk sig som ledare i kriminella kretsar. Ledaren för Vårbynätverket har långtgående planer på att mörda sin rival. I Expressens rapporteringar har vi kallat ledaren för ”Mujaheed” och rivalen för ”Torpeden”. 
• Åtalspunkt 9-10 gäller människorov, rån, grovt vapenbrott, försök till grov utpressning, förberedelse till allmänfarlig ödeläggelse, grovt brott, brott mot lagen om brandfarliga och explosiva varor, grovt brott. Detta är alltså den omtalade kidnappningen av en känd svensk artist som skedde i april förra året. Rapparen Yasin är åtalat för inblandning i planeringen av kidnappningen.


Rättegången mot flera ledande i kriminella Värbynätverket går vidare. 30 personer står åtalade och misstankarna gäller bland annat stämpling och försök till mord, synnerligen grovt vapenbrott och grovt narkotikabrott. Vårbynätverkets utpekade ledare pressades i rätten i fråga om det är han som legat bakom aliaset "Mujaheed" på Encrochat. 


Du prenumererar väl? http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=ExpressenTV

Här finns vi:

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico — go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz — this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful — please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive — https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive — https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. — https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. — https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster — https://ve42.co/Broughton

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. — https://ve42.co/Bennett2002

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. — https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon — https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. — https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. — https://ve42.co/Cardiac

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. — https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. — https://ve42.co/Tyson1994

Winfree, A. T. (2001). The geometry of biological time (Vol. 12). Springer Science & Business Media. — https://ve42.co/Winfree2001

Special thanks to Patreon supporters: Mac Malkawi, Oleksii Leonov, Michael Schneider, Jim Osmun, Tyson McDowell, Ludovic Robillard, jim buckmaster, fanime96, Juan Benet, Ruslan Khroma, Robert Blum, Richard Sundvall, Lee Redden, Vincent, Lyvann Ferrusca, Alfred Wallace, Arjun Chakroborty, Joar Wandborg, Clayton Greenwell, Pindex, Michael Krugman, Cy 'kkm' K'Nelson, Sam Lutfi, Ron Neal

Written by Derek Muller and Petr Lebedev
Animation by Fabio Albertelli and Jakub Misiek
GFX and 3D animation by Jonny Hyman
Filmed by Derek Muller and Raquel Nuno
Edited by Derek Muller
Additional video supplied by Getty Images
Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

More footage from NASA's Scientific Visualization Studio

100 metronome video from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=suxu1bmPm2g

Intro animation by Jorge Cham

Thanks for the BZ footage from SteinbockGroup: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJn1ssZEyns and 
NileRed https://youtu.be/LL3kVtc-4vY

Animation of waves in the heart from The Virtual Heart/ EM Cherry/ FH Fenton — https://ve42.co/Cardiac and https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Chemical materials and protocol provided by Mike Morris and the UCI Chemistry Outreach Program https://www.chem.uci.edu/~jsnowick/outreach/UCI_Outreach/index.html

Thanks to Alie Ward for title/thumbnail consultation
Thanks to Dr Juliette Becker and Dr James O'Donoghue for the planetary science help

Music from Jonny Hyman, Epidemic Sound https://epidemicsound.com "Seaweed" "Deeper Than The Ocean" "Ripple Effect"
Music also from Artlist https://artlist.com "Children of Mystery"

Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

en.title: The Secret of Synchronization
en.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico — go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz — this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful — please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive — https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive — https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

snippet.description:
Go to https://buyraycon.com/stonie for 15% off your order!
Video Sponsored by: Raycon

Another cereal of the bucket list!! Reese's Puffs!
I knew going into it it'd be one of the more difficult cereal challenges due to how crunchy Reese's Puffs are, but what I didn't expect was the Chocolate & Peanut Butter flavor to be off the charts...

🔥SHOP NOW!!🔥━► https://www.teamrar.com/ 

Carter Sharer, @Unspeakable , Lizzy Capri, Ryan Prunty, Stove's Kitchen, Deniesse and James Amendola just did LAST TO LEAVE ISLAND KEEPS IT CHALLENGE (https://youtu.be/oalMNPw5QmQ)!! But today Carder is trapped behind 100 layers of cardboard vs @Preston trapped behind 100 layers of foam!! Matt Braeden recorded all the action on his iPhone 12 as Carer, and Peston get handed tools like spears, bow and arrow, pick axe, toothpicks, pillows, bananas, orbeez, and even a chainsaw!! Lizzy Capri and Ryan Prunty don't make it easy for Carer and Prestonn!! Who do you think will win?? What weapon or tool would you use?? Comment below!!

snippet.title: Spaningssoldat
snippet.description:
Spaningssoldaterna är bataljonens ögon. De ligger långt framför de egna förbanden och förser beslutsfattare med underrättelser om motståndarens position och förmåga. Utan att synas eller höras, och till fots med tung packning, bidrar spaningssoldaternas rapporter till att vi kan nyttja våra resurser på bästa sätt och uppnå maximal verkan. Utan spaning, ingen aning.

I videon får vi följa de värnpliktiga spaningssoldaterna på grundutbildningen på Södra skånska regementet P 7.

Produktion: Felix Sundbäck med stöd av Jesper Moldvik samt spaningspluton på grundutbildningsbataljonen på P 7.

snippet.title: KURRAGÖMMA PÅ SVERIGES FÖRSTA ACTIONBAD *KOKPUNKTEN MED Let's Feast*
snippet.description:
Vi har blivit inbjuda av de fantastiska Let's Feast gänget ( SPANA IN DERAS kanal: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfVhfIHkSyzSnCErrbEeGLg 
( EN GALET ROLIG VIDEO ligger upp på deras kanal) 

För en hel dag på Kokpunkten i Västerås/ https://kokpunkten.se/ Klicka på länken för mer info.
När ni sätt klart på denna video så kan ni hoppa direkt in på Let's Feast kanal för att se vilken galen 
challenge vi fick i deras video!

Vi hade en grym dag och stort tack till alla som var med under dagen.
Otroligt bra energi genom hela inspelningen så sjukt kul och vi han med att filma 3 riktigt härliga videos tillsammans med Christian, Jonny, Colin, Andreas, Tomas och jag.

Hoppas att ni gillar dagens video! 👌😍👍
Kärlek till er, kram

Musik
www.epidemicsound.com

snippet.title: Wienerschnitzel | Leif Mannerström
snippet.description:
Videon innehåller betald marknadsföring av smeg.se, lecreuset.se och sundqvist.se

Använd koden LEIF6 i SMEGs webbshop så får ni 6 % rabatt på alla SMEG produkter.
Här kommer du till SMEGs webbshop* bit.ly/3anpqmF 

Idag är det dags för wienerschnitzel, häng med när jag lagar denna otroligt goda klassiker som också är Österrikes nationalrätt.

Ingredienser:
Kalvinnanlår 
Ägg 
Mixat pankobröd
Vetemjöl
Olja och smör till stekning
Isterflott
Citron
Ansjovisfiléer och kapris efter smak

Potatissallad:
3 dl Kycklingbuljong
3 msk olivolja
Vitlök
1 Rödlök
2 tsk dijonsenap
Salt och peppar
1 knippe vårlök
ljummen kokt potatis

Gurksallad:
1 Gurka
1/2 dl vitvinsvinäger
2 msk råsocker
1/2 chili
1 knippe bladpersilja
salt och peppar

Tillbehör:
1 gul lök
6 skivor strimlad skinka
3 dl gröna ärtor

För affärsförfrågningar:
Mikael Drené
+46 721 69 67 64
mikael@mannerstrom.com

Mina sociala medier:
www.instagram.com/mannerstromofficiell
www.facebook.com/mannerstromofficiell

www.mannerstrom.se

- Länk märkt * är en affiliatelänk och jag får provision för köp som görs via den eller klick som den genererar. Jag väljer alltid själv ut vilka produkter jag marknadsför på det här sättet.

Foto/Redigering
Astor Svensson

Inredning/Rekvisita
Petronella Mannerström

Dukning/Dekoration
Lilian Mannerström

Producent
Elias Eriksson

snippet.title: Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death
snippet.description:
'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her household’s most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular – a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing “appropriate” engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the Queen’s deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Flyttat in hos sitt ex, säljer inte bilen! | Lyxfällan
snippet.description:
Sandra, 27 år, från Emmaboda har under många år varit ekonomiskt beroende av andra och inte lärt sig att klara sig på egna ben. Hon har till synes noll koll på sin ekonomi och slösar tusenlappar hon inte äger på veteranbilar och nätshopping. När det tog slut med hennes sambo hade hon inte råd att betala hyran, vilket gjorde att hon flyttade in hos sitt ex i ett försök att kunna leva snålare för att betala av lånen. Sandra har utgifter på hisnande 79 200 kr varje månad men en inkomst på ringa 18 000 kr. Situationen är minst sagt ohållbar och under veckan arbetar Magnus Hedberg och coachen Philip Diab mycket med Sandras självförtroende för att hon ska våga ta rodret över sitt eget liv. 

Följ Viafree för mer klipp och extramaterial från våra program
https://www.facebook.com/viafree 
https://www.instagram.com/viafreesverige

snippet.title: Why South Africa is still so segregated
snippet.description:
How centuries of division built one of the most unequal countries on earth.

Subscribe to our channel and turn on notifications (🔔) http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

For decades, South Africa was under apartheid: a series of laws that divided people by race. Then, in the 1990s, those laws were dismantled. But many of the barriers they created continue to divide South Africans by skin color - which in turn determines their quality of life, access to jobs, and wealth. Racial division was built into the fabric of cities throughout South Africa, and it still hasn't been uprooted.

That's partly because, while apartheid was the culmination of South Africa's racial divisions, it wasn't the beginning of them. That story starts closer to the 1800s, when the British built a network of railroads that transformed the region's economy into one that excluded most Black people -- and then made that exclusion the law.

Sources and further reading:

If you want to learn more about the railroads and how they impacted Cape Colony’s economy, check out this paper by Johan Fourie and Alonso Herranz Loncan:
https://academic.oup.com/ereh/article-abstract/22/1/73/3930943?redirectedFrom=fulltext

To understand segregation in South Africa’s major urban centers, take a look at this paper about segregation and inequality: 
https://www.seri-sa.org/images/SERI_Edged_out_report_Final.pdf

For more information on post-Apartheid cities, you can read this paper by Edgar Pieterse (who we feature in the video):
https://www.africancentreforcities.net/wp-content/uploads/2013/10/post-apartheid_geographies_pieterse_15dec09.pdf 

To explore the history and legacy of District Six, visit the District Six Museum website:
https://www.districtsix.co.za/

Thanks for watching and let us know what you think in the comments!

snippet.title: Building Thumb Bucket Ep 2 (Berms, rollers, and singletrack!)
snippet.description:
Thumb bucket is Berm Peak's first machine cut mountain bike trail, which when finished will be a blank canvas for crazy features. This series documents us building the trail from bottom to top, from learning how to use a machine, to drainage, to technical difficulties.

Check out Squatch's YouTube Channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFpcbXL6wsGrQhUDQgvOGCQ

Check out Joe's YouTube Channel 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCccgqHpyg6ax6dLzBx9yZGA

Berm Peak Hoodies, Beanies, Jerseys, Shirts
https://cognativemtb.com/collections/seths-bike-hacks-collection

Check out our second channel for "express" videos https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOpP5PqrzODWpFU961acUbg

Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sethsbikehacks
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/sethsbikehacks

Music in this video is from 
http://share.epidemicsound.com/trQSg
and https://soundstripe.com?fpr=seth20

snippet.title: Camdaki Kız | 1. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Camdaki Kız 1. Bölüm 

8 Nisan Perşembe

Türkiye'nin en büyük oteller zinciri olan Koroğlu'nun şirketinde mimar olarak çalışan Nalan, yumuşak huylu, zeki, sıcakkanlı ve dünyalar güzeli bir genç kadındır. Ailesinin tek çocuğudur. Hayatını varlık, ilgi, alaka içinde geçirmiş, en iyi okullardan dereceyle mezun olmuş olan Nalan'ın, herkesten sakladığı bir sırrı vardır...

Diğer yandan Nalan'ın çalıştığı şirketin genç veliahtı Sedat, kendisinden yaşça büyük ve evli bir kadın olan, sosyetik güzel Cana ile uzun yıllardır yasak bir ilişki yaşamaktadır. Şirketin sahibi ve Sedat'ın babası olan Rafet Koroğlu, yıllarca didinip kurduğu Koroğlu imparatorluğunun itibarının, şımarık oğlu Sedat tarafından lekelenmesine izin vermeyecektir. Rafet, Sedat'ı Cana'dan ayırmak için, onu zorla başka biriyle evlendirmeye karar verir.

Ve kader çarkı döner... Sedat ile Nalan'ın yolları kesişir. Hayatı boyunca kendisini babasına ispatlayamamış olan Sedat'ın tek çaresi, daha önce hiç tanımadığı Nalan'la evlenmektir. Peki Sedat, Nalan'ın hayallerindeki "kurtarıcı prens" midir? 

Çocukluklarından yaralı olan bu ikili kavuşup masallardaki gibi bir aşk yaşayabilecek midir? Yoksa onları bugüne kadar hiç hayal etmedikleri bir karanlık mı beklemektedir?

Gülseren Budayıcıoğlu’nun aynı isimli romanından uyarlanan, gerçek bir aşk hikayesinin konu alındığı Camdaki Kız, başarılı oyuncu kadrosuyla da göz dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu Biricik’in canlandırdığı Camdaki Kız’da; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Güler, Feyyaz Şerifoğlu, Hamza Yazıcı, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Sürer, Selma Ergeç,  Şerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuğrul Tülek yer alıyor. Senaryosunu Seda Altaylı Turgutlu’nun kaleme aldığı, yönetmenliğini ise Nadim Güç'ün üstlendiği Camdaki Kız Perşembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

------------------

Camdaki Kız Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu’s novel of the same name, Camdaki Kız is based on a true love story. Kanal D’s new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. Written by Seda Altayli Turgutlu, directed by Nadim Guc, Camdaki Kiz is going to premier on 8 April Thursday at 8 pm on Kanal D!

Oyuncular:  Burcu Biricik, Devrim Yakut, Feyyez Şerifoğlu, Hamza Yazıcı, Hande Ataizi, Nur Sürer, Selma Ergeç, Şerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuğrul Tülek bulunuyor

Web Site : https://www.ogmpictures.com/
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/Camdaki-K%C4%B1z-105205951609216/,
Twitter : https://twitter.com/camdakikizdizi

#CamdakiKız #OGMPictures #KanalD

snippet.description:
Wadih El Cheikh - Ana Aw La Ahad (Official Music Video) | وديع الشيخ - أنا أو لا أحد

Lyrics & Composed by: Fares Eskandar
Arranged by: Omar Sabbagh
Directed by: Ahmad Al Mnajed

Subscribe to Wadih El Cheikh official channel: https://bit.ly/2QUsW0D

Digital Distribution: CHBK Music

#WadihElCheikh
#Ana_Aw_La_Ahad

Lyrics:

روحي سأَلي عني أنا الإستاذ 
هيك إسمي عا تلفون كل حلوة
بصيب القلب بالضحكة والغمّاز
ما في بنت أخدت معي غلوة 
رقمِـك جبت فكري عملت إنجاز
قاصد غروري بشوفتِك إروي 
آلو مرحبا سمعتن أنا ألغـاز
من كتر ما حسيت بالنشوة 
أنا من أول آلـو موّتني الصوت الحلو 
قلبي كان ماشي بيجنن خربط 
ما عاد إكـفَلـو 
ما عاد ساعتني الدني 
طاير مدري شو بني 
بـآب لو بسهر معاكي 
رح حسو راس السنة ...

مارق عاراسي أشكال ألوان 
تعوّدت إملك شو ما بستحلي 
قلبي مع الحلوين دونجوان
متل اللي رايح عالصيد رحلة
جيتي سَـحَرتيني بلا استئذان 
ما سَـألتيني إذا بتسمحلي
فايت عاقلبِك للأبد عشقان 
خلّي شرايينِـك كلّـهـا تزحلي

localized.description:
Wadih El Cheikh - Ana Aw La Ahad (Official Music Video) | وديع الشيخ - أنا أو لا أحد

Lyrics & Composed by: Fares Eskandar
Arranged by: Omar Sabbagh
Directed by: Ahmad Al Mnajed
Mix & Mastering: Omar Sabbagh

Subscribe to Wadih El Cheikh official channel: https://bit.ly/2QUsW0D

Follow Wadih El Cheikh On: 

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wadihelcheikhofficial 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/wadihelcheikhlb 
Tiktok:https://vm.tiktok.com/ZSJjCVAf3/

Digital Distribution: CHBK Music

#WadihElCheikh
#Ana_Aw_La_Ahad

Lyrics:

روحي سأَلي عني أنا الإستاذ 
هيك إسمي عا تلفون كل حلوة
بصيب القلب بالضحكة والغمّاز
ما في بنت أخدت معي غلوة 
رقمِـك جبت فكري عملت إنجاز
قاصد غروري بشوفتِك إروي 
آلو مرحبا سمعتن أنا ألغـاز
من كتر ما حسيت بالنشوة 
أنا من أول آلـو موّتني الصوت الحلو 
قلبي كان ماشي بيجنن خربط 
ما عاد إكـفَلـو 
ما عاد ساعتني الدني 
طاير مدري شو بني 
بـآب لو بسهر معاكي 
رح حسو راس السنة ...

مارق عاراسي أشكال ألوان 
تعوّدت إملك شو ما بستحلي 
قلبي مع الحلوين دونجوان
متل اللي رايح عالصيد رحلة
جيتي سَـحَرتيني بلا استئذان 
ما سَـألتيني إذا بتسمحلي
فايت عاقلبِك للأبد عشقان 
خلّي شرايينِـك كلّـهـا تزحلي

snippet.title: SVT:s VINKLADE SIFFROR: om mediernas vilseledande statistik
snippet.description:
RUSAR STÖDET för Sveriges ministrar? Så är det, om man ska tro Sveriges Televisions bombastiska rubriksättning.

Vad baserar SVT denna slutsats på? Förekommer vilseledande statistik i Sverige? Och vad händer i ett samhälle där information vinklas med ideologiska förtecken?

Dessa frågor tar jag upp i veckans video.


KÖP MIN T-SHIRT “Demokratins förgörare” här:
👕  https://bit.ly/2LaqAry

snippet.title: PUPPET MASTER #4
snippet.description:
I dagens avsnitt har slottet byggts om till Casino och insatserna ökar i alla bemärkelser. Deltagarna tror inte sina ögon när  Mr X kliver in genom dörren...

Tio främlingar inlåsta med varandra. Hundratusen kronor. Hur långt är de beredda att gå?
Programledare: Joakim Lundell och Diana Moseni.
Instagram: @puppetmasterse

-------------------------------------
Puppetmaster är ett format skapat av Joakim Lundell
Producent: Joakim Lundell
Producent: Jonas Bergström
Programledare: Joakim Lundell, Diana Moseni
A-kamera: Arben Rrustemi
B-Kamera:  Jesper Olsson
Projektledare: Stefan Hallgren, Danjal Kanani
Ljud: Petter Nilsson www.sonnerproduktion.se
POST/EB: Active Productions  -  www.activeproductions.se
Exekutiv Producent: Stefan Hallgren

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

Marvel's The Falcon and the Winter Soldier Episode 4 ends with the dark twist of new Captain America John Walker using his shield to brutally kill Flag-Smasher Nico. Erik Voss breaks down this episode shot by shot for every Marvel Easter Egg you missed, including Black Panther design elements in the fight the with Dora Milaje, and various other callbacks to Captain America Civil War (2016) and Captain America Winter Soldier (2014)

snippet.title: Çukur 4.Sezon 32.Bölüm
snippet.description:
Bu dizi ve çok daha fazlası puhutv'de → https://puhutv.com/cukur-detay?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=cukur&utm_content=detay

Çukur'a Abone Olmak İçin → https://bit.ly/cukur-dd-sub

4.Sezon 32. Bölüm Özet:

Yamaç’ın, Amca’nın kurduğu düzeni bitirmek için yaptığı zeka dolu plan Vartolu ve Yamaç’ı bir kez daha karşı karşıya getirecek. Kararından geri adım atmayan Yamaç’ın aksiyonu nefesleri kesecek. İçindeki ateşi yeniden bulan Cumali, sürpriz bir hamle ile mahalledeki tüm dengeleri değiştirecek. Karaca’nın sürpriz bir ziyaretçi yüzünden kafası karışacak. Celasun’dan haber alamayan Karaca, peşine düştüğü ipucu sayesinde önemli bir bilgi elde edecek. Bu bilgi Amca ve Karaca’yı karşı karşıya getirirken, gerçekleşen yüzleşmenin sonucu herkesi şoka uğratacak.


Yönetmen: Sinan Öztürk
Senaryo: Gökhan Horzum, Damla Serim
Yapımcı: Kerem Çatay
İdari Yapımcı: Yamaç Okur
Müzik: Toygar Işıklı
2. Yönetmen: Barbaros Bilgin
Görüntü Yönetmeni: Tolga Kutluay
Sanat Yönetmeni: Oya Köseoğlu

OYUNCULAR
Yamaç: Aras Bulut İynemli
Sultan: Perihan Savaş
Cumali Amca: Müfit Kayacan
Vartolu: Erkan Kolçak Köstendil
Aliço: Rıza Kocaoğlu
Cumali: Necip Memili
Efsun: Damla Sönmez
Celasun: Kubilay Aka
Akın: Burak Dakak
Damla: Hare Sürel
Emmi: Kadir Çermik
Ayşe: İrem Altuğ
Saadet: Boncuk Yılmaz
Medet: Mustafa Kırantepe
Karaca: Ece Yaşar
Metin: Cem Uslu
Meke: Aytaç Uşun
Murtaza: Ferit Kaya
Nedim: İlkay Akdağlı
Feyyaz: Erdağ Yenel
Cennet: Aylin Engör
Seher: Begüm Akkaya
Yasmin: Gamze Doğanoğlu

Konuk Oyuncu: Genco Özak

#Çukur #DoğaNefesAlsın #Karaca

snippet.title: Maraşlı 13. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Maraşlı 13. Bölüm Özeti:

Maraşlı ve Mahur uzun zaman sonra ilk kez bir araya gelir. Aralarında yaşanan hesaplaşmada, Maraşlı’nın bunca zamandır nerede olduğunu soran Mahur, Maraşlı’nın elini kana bulamasından rahatsız olur. Ama bu hesaplaşmanın asıl konusu birbirlerine kavuşamamalarıdır. Maraşlı, Mahur ile ilişkisi ile ilgili nasıl karar alacaktır? İlhan, Necati’ye şirketin el değiştirdiğini anlatır. Necati, İlhan’a Aziz’in her şeyi bilmesi gerektiğini söyler. İlhan, Aziz’e her şeyi anlatabilecek gücü bulabilecek midir? Aziz, şirketi kaybettiğini öğrenirse tepkisi ne olacaktır?Türel Ailesi, Mahur’un sergisine gidecekleri sırada aldıkları haberle Mahur’un hayatının yine tehlikede olduğunu öğrenir. Maraşlı, Mahur’un başına gelebilecek tehlikeye karşı sergiye gider. İlhan’ın peşinde olan Behram, İlhan’a iki saat içinde teslim olmaz ise Mahur’u ve tüm sergidekileri öldürüleceğini söyler. Maraşlı sergidekileri koruma altına alırken Nevzat bombayı uzaktan patlatacak kişinin peşine düşer. Olayların kontrolden çıkmasıyla gözler Maraşlı’ya çevrilir. Maraşlı, Mahur ve sergiye gelen konukların hayatını nasıl kurtaracaktır?

Maraşlı yeni bölümüyle Pazartesi 20.00'de atv'de! 
Maraşlı Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://rb.gy/shb5tt

Oyuncuları:
Burak Deniz
Alina Boz
Kerem Atabeyoğlu
Serhat Kılıç
Saygın Soysal
Rojda Demirer
Cemil Büyükdöğerli
Melis İşiten
Cihan Yenici

#maraşlı​ #fragman #tanıtım

ar.title: المرعشلي الحلقة 13
ar.description: يلتقى المرعشلي وماهور بعد غياب طويل, تسأل ماهور أين كانت المرعشلي طوال هذا الوقت بعد حسابات بينهما والمرعشلي منزعج لأن يده تلطخت بالدماء. لكن أساس موضوع محاسبتهما لبعضهما هو عدم لقاءهما. ماهو القرار الذي سيتخذه المرعشلي بخصوص علاقته مع ماهور؟ يخبر إلهان نجاتي أنه نقل ممتلكات الشركة لشخص آخر, يخبر نجاتي إلهان إنه على عزيز أن يعلم كل شيء, فهل يملك إلهان الجرأة والقوة أن يخبر عزيز بكل شيء؟ ماهي ردة فعل عزيز عندما يعلم أنه خسر الشركة؟ تدرك عائلة توريل أثناء ذهابها إلى معرض ماهور أن حياة ماهور في خطر  بعد الخبر الذي تلقوه. يذهب المرعشلي إلى المعرض للوقوف ضد الخطر الذي سيحل بماهور. يخبرهم بهرام الذي يلاحق إلهان إنه إن لم تيسلم نفسه في غضون ساعتين سوف يقتل ماهور وجميع من في المعرض. عندما يضع المرعشلي جميع من في المعرض تحت حمايته, يلاحق نوزت الشخص الذي سيفجر القنبلة من بعيد, تتجه الأنظار نحو المرعشلي بعد خروج الأمور عن السيطرة, فكيف سينقذ حياة ماهور والضيوف التي جاءت إلى المعرض؟

Download and play AFK Arena: https://patron.me/HacksmithAFK Join AFK Arena's 2nd anniversary event: April 6th to May 5th and get 100 free summons and 1 special gift code: aaz27uvgfi
OUR NEW SHIRT ► https://hacksmith.store/collections/special-offers/products/the-hacklorian-t-shirt

In our HACKLORIAN series, we'll be making all of Mando's gadgets, armor, and weapons! Make sure to become a YouTube member to see the videos before anyone else! Next up... Grapple gun!

Check out the circuit diagram at Maker.IO ► https://www.digikey.com/en/maker/projects/the-hacksmith-building-a-mandalorian-jetpack/054d24f65f574fcc8cfb0b90b6d26f6f

Watch the Mandalorian on Disney+ ► https://www.disneyplus.com/sign-up

Watch the whole Hacklorian Series Playlist ► https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FX8192MVmd8&list=PLbncXbXlaNQcxSSb0THFDaDy_C_ojvYig

Check out JLCPCB for all your PCB needs! ► https://jlcpcb.com/RHS

Become a Hacksmith member get exclusive perks! ► https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjgpFI5dU-D1-kh9H1muoxQ/join
►Early video access 
►Project design files (solidworks)
►Merch Discounts 
►Collaborate with us on our videos 

SOCIAL
Website ► http://www.hacksmith.tech
Facebook ► http://www.facebook.com/thehacksmith
Instagram ► http://www.instagram.com/thehacksmith
Twitter ► http://twitter.com/thehacksmith
Patreon ► http://www.patreon.com/thehacksmith
Discord ► https://discordapp.com/invite/thehacksmith 
Merch ► https://www.hacksmith.store

CHAPTERS: 
0:00 Intro
2:00 Our Jetpack Components
3:24 James and Bogdan Talk Design
6:48 Cross Vectoring Jets!
7:30 Mounting The Components
8:20 Build a PCB!
9:22 The Jetpack Cover
13:03 Does It Work With The Costume?
13:45 Final Assembly
16:29 Outro

MUSIC CREDITS:
Big thank you to Samuel Kim Music for the epic music!
https://www.youtube.com/c/samuelkimmusic 
https://twitter.com/samuelkimmusic 
https://www.instagram.com/samuelkimmusic

SOFTWARE:
PCB Design ► https://www.altium.com/yt/TheHacksmith
Video Review / Collaboration ► http://r.frame.io/pZq3N
Video Editing ► Adobe Premiere 
CAD ► Solidworks 
CAM ► Autodesk HSM http://bit.ly/HSMworks

CAMERA GEAR:
Highspeed Cam - Chronos 1.4 ► http://bit.ly/chronosCam
Main shooter - Panasonic GH5s ► https://bhpho.to/2Fjd80N 
Phone - Samsung S10  ► https://bhpho.to/2N8FOh8
Camcorder - Sony Handycam ► https://bhpho.to/2FDnq81 
Action Cam - GoPro ► https://bhpho.to/2FxXDC4 
Steadicam - Removu K1 ► https://bhpho.to/2N9lDQq 
Main mic - Sennheiser ► https://bhpho.to/2DsR8ec
Bendy Tripod ► https://bhpho.to/2FyLNb0 
Main Tripods - old second hand Manfrotto tripods no longer sold. 
Studio Light - Luxli ► https://bhpho.to/2N9SPav

TOOLS / MACHINES: 
CNC Mill - Tormach 1100MX ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8DWG0
CNC Mill - Tormach PCNC 440 ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8DYk0
CNC Lathe - Tormach 15L ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8Gcp0
Autofeed Bandsaw - Tormach AF50 ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8Gj10
CNC Waterjet Cutter ► http://bit.ly/wazerJet
CNC Plasma Cutter ► http://bit.ly/EMTplasma
3d Printers ► http://bit.ly/H1Printer
Laser Cutter - Gweike LG900N 80W ► http://lmgtfy.com/?q=lg900n 
3d Scanner ► http://amzn.to/2pwbvTu
Drills, drivers, grinders, saws, etc ► http://amzn.to/2p9SPJ3 
Mig Welder ► http://bit.ly/MP250iWelder
Tig Welder ► http://bit.ly/Tig200Welder
Quiet Air Compressor ► http://bit.ly/38zVKzB
Desktop PC ► https://youtu.be/gSbt3LK8hCs 
Oscilloscope ► https://bit.ly/38sOzKw
Multimeters ► https://bit.ly/2WKwPEQ

Purchases made through some store links may provide some compensation to Hacksmith.

WARNING: THESE VIDEOS ARE FOR ENTERTAINMENT PURPOSES ONLY. PERSONAL USE OF VIDEO CONTENT IS AT YOUR OWN RISK. THE HACKSMITH IS A TRAINED PROFESSIONAL WHO KNOWS EXACTLY WHAT HE'S DOING. EXCEPT WHEN HE DOESN'T. DO NOT ATTEMPT TO RECREATE OR RE-ENACT ANYTHING SHOWN IN THESE VIDEOS.

#hacklorian #mandalorian #makeitreal

snippet.title: Day In The Life of A Michelin Star Chef
snippet.description:
Go behind the scenes with Alvin as he spends a day with Chef Jane of Jeju Noodle Bar, the first michelin-starred noodle bar in America. From meticulously preparing fish to preparing endless bowls of noodles, being a chef might be harder than it seem.
Jeju Noodle Bar: https://www.instagram.com/jejunoodlebar/






About To Eat: A new YouTube channel from your internet food friends.
About To Eat is the excitement of knowing something wonderful is coming.
-Inga, Andrew, Adam, Annie, Liza, Alvin, Rie, Jody (and more)

Follow us on Instagram:
http://instagram.com/abouttoeat

Check out some of our friends at BuzzFeed:
https://www.youtube.com/buzzfeedvideo
https://www.youtube.com/buzzfeedtasty
https://www.youtube.com/tastyrecipes
https://www.youtube.com/bringme

Credits: https://www.buzzfeed.com/bfmp/videos/126386




https://www.youtube.com/abouttoeat
tags: what its like to be a chef

snippet.title: Highlights: Arsenal 0-3 Liverpool | Jota's brace and a Salah special win it at the Emirates
snippet.description:
Watch all the key action from the Emirates Stadium, where substitute Diogo Jota scored either side of Mo Salah's individual effort to give Jürgen Klopp's side the points at Arsenal.

Enjoy more content and get exclusive perks in our Liverpool FC Members Area, click here to find out more: https://www.youtube.com/LiverpoolFC/join

snippet.title: United States v Switzerland - 3v6 Qualification Game - World Men's Curling Championship 2021
snippet.description:
United States face Switzerland in the 3v6 Qualification Game of the BKT Tires & OK Tire World Men's Curling Championship 2021 presented by New Holland.

Visit the official event website for further schedule details - https://worldcurling.org/events/wmcc2021

Games that have geo-blocking restrictions—to comply with our broadcast partner agreements—will be made available world-wide 30 days after the end of the competition.

#curling #Roadto2022 #WMCC2021

snippet.description: Filip Poon är den underbara tv-kocken som slog igenom i Tv4 programmet Sveriges Mästerkock. Vi pratar om att hans efternamn betyder fi**a, om han lärde sig något när han tittade på Fråga Olle o varför han har riktiga lökringar under armarna. Det o sjukt mycket mer som vanligt i veckans avsnitt av Intimt med Björken.

snippet.title: Prince Charles: 'My Dear Papa Was a Very Special Person'
snippet.description:
Prince Charles made a short statement outside Highgrove House this afternoon to mark the passing of his father, the Duke of Edinburgh.

The Prince of Wales commented on his father's seven decades of service to Queen and country. He added that: "My family and I will miss him enormously... My dear Papa was a very special person."

#PrinceCharles #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: EPIC HOMEMADE James Bond Car
snippet.description:
No other Z3 can spit fire, lift itself up, shoot, Smoke and deliver biscuits at the flick of a switch.

Make sure you check out the new series of Top Gear with Freddie, Paddy and Chris on BBC One, Sundays at 8pm - or on BBCiPlayer here http://bbc.in/38Tc3JN

And check out the Top Gear https://www.youtube.com/user/TopGear and James Bond https://www.youtube.com/user/jamesbond007 YouTube channels too!

Part 1 here https://youtu.be/QDoF8jwMcH0
Part 2 here https://youtu.be/qZydcgde1Ms

Follow me on Social Media.
Instagram https://www.instagram.com/realcolinfurze/
Twitter https://twitter.com/colin_furze
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/Colin-furze-521680751253584
TikTok https://vm.tiktok.com/JJ8wSTs/

Music

Its all Library music apart from 2 track by the band "Rock Cake" called "I want You" and "Bad News"
https://www.instagram.com/RockCakeMusic

In a band? Want your music on my videos! Send your tracks to furzemail@yahoo.co.uk as all music on this channel is from viewers

#colinfurze #topgear #jamesbond
